2026-04-27T15:49:12.6909908Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-27T15:49:12.6910507Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-27T15:49:12.6910948Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-27T15:49:12.6911308Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-27T15:49:12.6911620Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-27T15:49:12.6911857Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-27T15:49:12.6912011Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-27T15:49:12.6912586Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-27T15:49:12.6913068Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-27T15:49:12.6913330Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-27T15:50:29.3959678Z   - If author_association is OWNER, MEMBER, or COLLABORATOR → team member

2026-04-27T15:50:29.3961084Z   - Exit the workflow (team members label their own issues)
2026-04-27T15:50:29.3961582Z   
2026-04-27T15:50:29.3961950Z   So I should add "needs-triage" label and exit.
2026-04-27T15:50:29.3962318Z 
2026-04-27T15:50:29.3963511Z ◆ The issue has no labels. The author `haiyuazhang` has `author_association: MEMBER` (Azure org member / team member). Per the decision flow, I add "needs-triage" and exit.
